label: Hard Hat Pak
blurb: Local Services, Trades & Construction. Bidding speed and field-to-office sync.

skills.label: Field Service Triage Dispatcher
skills.method: Takes a homeowner's text ("my AC is leaking water"), categorizes it as a clogged condensate line, and books the nearest tech.

skills.label: Change Order Generator
skills.method: Takes a text from a foreman ("client wants the cabinets painted blue now"), calculates the labor/material delta, and emails the client for an e-signature.
trigger_examples: stops contractors from doing free work

skills.label: Blueprint Takeoff Estimator
skills.method: Scans architectural PDFs, counts doors, windows, and linear feet of drywall, populates the quoting spreadsheet.
trigger_examples: turns a 3-day manual estimation job into 10 minutes

skills.label: Punch List Photo Sorter
skills.method: Takes 100 messy photos uploaded by a foreman, categorizes them by room and trade, and formats them into a clean PDF report for the client.

skills.label: Material Price Escalation Alert
skills.method: Scrapes Home Depot/local supplier APIs daily for lumber and copper prices, alerting sales to update outstanding quotes.
trigger_examples: protects profit margins from sudden inflation

skills.label: Municipal Permit Autofiller
skills.method: Takes job specs and maps them onto the wildly different, archaic PDF permit applications of 500 different counties.

skills.label: Weather Delay Schedule Shifter
skills.method: Monitors local forecasts; if heavy rain is predicted, automatically pushes the concrete pouring crew back a day and texts the client.

skills.label: Subcontractor Lien Waiver Tracker
skills.method: Emails plumbers/electricians requesting signed lien waivers, holds their payout in escrow until the document is received and verified.
trigger_examples: protects general contractors from legal nightmares

skills.label: Equipment Rental Return Nag
skills.method: Tracks when a scissor lift was rented from Sunbelt, checks the job schedule, and schedules the pickup the day it's no longer needed.
trigger_examples: stops contractors from bleeding cash on unused rentals
